parameters.name: countries
parameters.value: ={{ ['latvia','lithuania','belarus','poland','russia','finland'].filter((country) => ({ latvia: $json.useLatvia, lithuania: $json.useLithuania, belarus: $json.useBelarus, poland: $json.usePoland, russia: $json.useRussia, finland: $json.useFinlandContextOnly })[country]).join(',') }}

parameters.jsCode: const req=$('normalize_input').first().json;const foreign=$('fetch_ebird_foreign').first().json||{};const history=$('fetch_elurikkus_history').first().json||{};const recent=$('fetch_estonia_recent').first().json||{};const weather=$('fetch_weather').first().json||{};const priority=['latvia','lithuania','belarus','poland','russia'];const enabled=priority.filter((c)=>({latvia:req.useLatvia,lithuania:req.useLithuania,belarus:req.useBelarus,poland:req.usePoland,russia:req.useRussia})[c]);const rows=(Array.isArray(foreign.rows)?foreign.rows:[]).map((row)=>({country:String(row.country||'').toLowerCase(),daysAgo:Number(row.daysAgo||0),distanceToEstoniaKm:Number(row.distanceToEstoniaKm||0),recordCount:Number(row.recordCount||0),lat:Number(row.lat||0),lon:Number(row.lon||0),hotspotName:String(row.hotspotName||row.name||'').trim(),countyOrParish:String(row.countyOrParish||row.region||'').trim(),habitatCue:String(row.habitatCue||'').trim()})).filter((row)=>row.country&&(enabled.includes(row.country)||row.country==='finland'));const countryScores={latvia:0,lithuania:0,belarus:0,poland:0,russia:0};for(const country of priority){const score=rows.filter((row)=>row.country===country).reduce((sum,row)=>sum+Math.max(0,20-row.daysAgo*2.5)+Math.max(0,20-row.distanceToEstoniaKm/80)+Math.min(30,row.recordCount*3)+((row.lat!==0||row.lon!==0)?10:0),0);countryScores[country]=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(score)));}const finlandContextOnly=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(rows.filter((row)=>row.country==='finland').reduce((sum,row)=>sum+Math.min(25,row.recordCount*2),0))));const primary=enabled.map((country)=>({country,score:countryScores[country]||0})).sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score)[0]||{country:'latvia',score:0};const springFitScore=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(Number(history.springFitScore||0)*0.7+Math.min(30,(Array.isArray(history.historicalHotspots)?history.historicalHotspots.length:0)*6))));const windSupportScore=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(Number(weather.windSupportScore||0))));const externalPressureScore=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(enabled.reduce((sum,c,index)=>sum+(countryScores[c]||0)*Math.max(1,5-index),0)/Math.max(1,enabled.reduce((sum,_c,index)=>sum+Math.max(1,5-index),0)))));const routeVector=primary.score>0?`${primary.country}->estonia ${String(weather.windDirection||'variable').trim()||'variable'}`:`regional_estonia ${String(weather.windDirection||'variable').trim()||'variable'}`;const bestEntryZone=primary.country==='latvia'?'Southwest Estonia':primary.country==='lithuania'?'South Estonia':primary.country==='belarus'?'Southeast Estonia':primary.country==='poland'?'West Estonia':primary.country==='russia'?'East Estonia':'West Estonia';const alreadyMissedRisk=recent.alreadyPassed?'high':(recent.alreadyPresent||Number(recent.recentCount7d||0)>10)?'medium':'low';const candidates=[...(Array.isArray(history.historicalHotspots)?history.historicalHotspots:[]).map((row)=>({name:String(row.name||'').trim(),countyOrParish:String(row.countyOrParish||'').trim(),lat:Number(row.lat||0),lon:Number(row.lon||0),confidence:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(Number(row.confidence||0)))),habitatCue:String(row.habitatCue||'').trim(),reason:String(row.reason||'').trim()})),...rows.filter((row)=>row.lat!==0||row.lon!==0).map((row)=>({name:row.hotspotName||`${row.country} migration hotspot`,countyOrParish:row.countyOrParish||row.country,lat:row.lat,lon:row.lon,confidence:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(50+row.recordCount*4-row.daysAgo*3))),habitatCue:row.habitatCue||'Migration stopover habitat',reason:`${row.country} pressure ${row.recordCount} recent records within ${row.distanceToEstoniaKm} km`}))].filter((p)=>p.name&&(p.lat!==0||p.lon!==0));const seen=new Set();const topPredictedPoints=(candidates.filter((p)=>{const key=`${p.name}|${p.lat}|${p.lon}`;if(seen.has(key))return false;seen.add(key);return true;}).sort((a,b)=>Number(b.confidence||0)-Number(a.confidence||0)).slice(0,Math.max(1,Number(req.outputCount||5))).map((point,index)=>({rank:index+1,name:point.name,countyOrParish:point.countyOrParish||bestEntryZone,lat:Number(point.lat||0),lon:Number(point.lon||0),confidence:Math.max(0,Math.min(100,Math.round(Number(point.confidence||0)))),eta:index===0?'24-48h':index<3?'48-72h':'3-5d',searchRadiusKm:Math.max(1,Math.round(Number(req.hotspotRadiusKm||5))),habitatCue:point.habitatCue||'Migration habitat',reason:point.reason||`Weighted by ${primary.country} source pressure and spring fit`})));const fallback=topPredictedPoints.length?topPredictedPoints:[{rank:1,name:`${req.speciesName} primary hotspot candidate`,countyOrParish:bestEntryZone,lat:58.6,lon:24.8,confidence:Math.max(25,Math.round((externalPressureScore+springFitScore+windSupportScore)/3)),eta:'2-4d',searchRadiusKm:Math.max(1,Math.round(Number(req.hotspotRadiusKm||5))),habitatCue:'Check exact coastal and wetland hotspots',reason:'No precise hotspot coordinates returned from upstream sources; using exact-point fallback placeholder'}];const insightSummary=req.requestType==='prediction'?'':`${req.speciesName}: strongest spring driver is ${primary.country} pressure, spring fit is ${springFitScore}/100, wind support is ${windSupportScore}/100.`;return [{json:{speciesKey:req.speciesKey,speciesName:req.speciesName,generatedAt:new Date().toISOString(),externalPressureScore,springFitScore,windSupportScore,routeVector,bestEntryZone,alreadyMissedRisk,countryScores:{latvia:countryScores.latvia,lithuania:countryScores.lithuania,belarus:countryScores.belarus,poland:countryScores.poland,russia:countryScores.russia,...(req.useFinlandContextOnly?{finlandContextOnly}: {})},topPredictedPoints:fallback,...(insightSummary?{insightSummary}:{}),rawResearchPayload:{request:{requestType:req.requestType,speciesKey:req.speciesKey,speciesName:req.speciesName,latinName:req.latinName,predictionMode:req.predictionMode},normalizedSources:{foreignSightings:rows.map((row)=>({country:row.country,daysAgo:row.daysAgo,distanceToEstoniaKm:row.distanceToEstoniaKm,recordCount:row.recordCount,lat:row.lat,lon:row.lon})),elurikkusHistory:{springFitScore:Number(history.springFitScore||0),historicalHotspots:Array.isArray(history.historicalHotspots)?history.historicalHotspots:[],habitatHints:Array.isArray(history.habitatHints)?history.habitatHints:[],arrivalWindow:String(history.arrivalWindow||'')},estoniaRecent:{alreadyPresent:Boolean(recent.alreadyPresent),alreadyPassed:Boolean(recent.alreadyPassed),recentCount7d:Number(recent.recentCount7d||0),recentCount30d:Number(recent.recentCount30d||0)},weather:{windSupportScore,windDirection:String(weather.windDirection||''),windSpeed:Number(weather.windSpeed||0),precipitation:Number(weather.precipitation||0)}}}}}];

string.name: insightSummary
string.value: ={{ $json.insightSummary || 'OpenAI summary placeholder: plug in a summarization node here if you want richer natural-language reasoning.' }}
